items.content:
About This Role

We are seeking a driven Enterprise Account Executive to close large, complex deals with Fortune 1000 companies. You will manage the full sales cycle from prospecting to close, working with technical buyers, procurement, and C-level executives to demonstrate the value of our platform.

Our enterprise segment is the fastest-growing part of our business, and this role offers significant earning potential with uncapped commissions on top of a competitive base salary.

Responsibilities

  • Own and manage a pipeline of enterprise opportunities with deal sizes of $100K-$500K+ ARR
  • Conduct discovery calls, product demonstrations, and technical evaluations
  • Navigate complex multi-stakeholder sales cycles with procurement and legal teams
  • Develop and execute strategic account plans for target accounts
  • Collaborate with Solutions Engineers, Customer Success, and Marketing to drive deals forward
  • Accurately forecast pipeline and revenue on a weekly and monthly basis

Requirements

  • 5+ years of enterprise SaaS sales experience with a consistent track record of exceeding quota
  • Experience selling to VP and C-level buyers in mid-market and enterprise organizations
  • Strong understanding of MEDDPICC, Challenger, or similar sales methodologies
  • Experience with Salesforce, Gong, and modern sales engagement tools
  • Excellent negotiation and presentation skills

Nice to Have

  • Experience selling CMS, DXP, or marketing technology solutions
  • Existing relationships with digital and IT leaders at target accounts
  • Technical background or ability to conduct product demos independently
